$comment: Pyxis golden mat_openpbr_mx_base_diffuse_roughness — MaterialX open_pbr_surface with base_diffuse_roughness=0.85, specular_weight=0. Sphere must shade with a chalky/retro-reflective rim, not Lambert. Catches regressions where base_diffuse_roughness is dropped and the diffuse term silently collapses to Lambert.
